Off Calendar Sep-09-2020 Continued To Oct-28-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-31-2020 Off Calendar

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-18-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted its tentative ruling.

The VERIFIED APPLICATION OF MICHAEL J. SMIKUN TO APPEAR AS COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE for plaintiff Richard Teed is granted. No opposition filed.

[After hearing, the Court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers.]

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE
Off Calendar Oct-09-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

RULING: Pursuant to plaintiff's request and or good cause, the Court vacates the tentative ruling and orders that:

PLAINTIFF RICHARD TEED's MOTION TO ADMIT COUNSEL PRO HAC VICE is continued to be heard on October 18, 2019 at 9:30am in Department 302.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
